commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: He that saith he knoweth Him, and keepeth not His commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in him."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: We have known him, if we keep his commandments. He speaks of that practical knowledge by love and affection, which can be only proved by our keeping his commandments; and without which we cannot be said to know God, as we should. (Challoner)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
